//: Skeleton config so future ``pyright preframr`` runs aren't drowning
in library-typing noise. Default mode = basic. Categories below are
currently disabled; flip each back to ``error`` as cleanups land,
mirroring the curated pylint warning gate in run_tests.sh.
reportPrivateImportUsage off: torch's stubs don't list common names
public API, and pyresidfp similarly mis-exports. ~86 of the 211
first-pass errors come from this category and are all noise.
Remaining 12 categories below cover the 116 errors observed at the
time pyright was wired into run_tests.sh. Cleaning up a category
and flipping its entry to ``error`` is the contract.
